prompt: A simple childlike digital doodle on a plain white background, centered and isolated, showing a cute cartoon monkey standing upright and facing forward. The monkey has a round beige face, brown fur outline, two round ears, small black dot eyes, and a thick wavy black smile. It wears a gray ushanka-style winter hat with brown ear flaps, and on the front of the hat there is a yellow circular patch with a red Bitcoin symbol. The monkey is dressed in a bright purple open jacket over a white shirt, with a gold chain necklace holding a round gold medallion marked with a black Bitcoin symbol. One arm is extended outward holding a purple handheld game console with a green screen and black control buttons; the other arm hangs to the side. The legs are short and simple with beige feet. Render it in a rough MS Paint style with uneven hand-drawn lines, flat colors, scribbly fills, playful proportions, and a naive internet-meme aesthetic, like a viral GPT Image 2 crayon sketch.
